description: Address semantic review findings: fix countdown interval locking, remove hardcoded savings stat, fix carousel image priority, add carousel ARIA landmarks.
steps: Fix lib/hooks/use-countdown.ts: Remove conditional intervalMs logic, always use 1-second interval
Fix components/offers/offers-client.tsx: Replace hardcoded 'You saved ₹230 this month' with a generic motivational line
Fix components/home/promo-banners.tsx: Pass index to BannerCard, set priority={index === 0}
Fix components/home/promo-banners.tsx: Add aria-label='Promotional banners' to section, add aria-roledescription='carousel' to the carousel grouping div
acceptance_criteria: useCountdown always ticks at 1-second intervals regardless of time remaining
No hardcoded savings amount shown to users
Only the first carousel banner image has priority={true}
Carousel section has aria-label and aria-roledescription attributes
verification: Run npx eslint lib/hooks/use-countdown.ts components/offers/offers-client.tsx components/home/promo-banners.tsx
